Event: The Fearless Adventure
Event Date: 29/01/2026
Sage Bot Item Code: E70
Call of the Path

Enhancement: 1
Once every 6 sec., the engraving's owner marks an attack target. For the next 2 sec., all of the archer's attacks against this target become critical.
Also all unit's attacks against the marked targets ignore 30% / 31% / 32% / 33% / 35% / 37% / 40% armor for the duration of the battle.

Enhancement: 2
3000 Damage from the gems
Once every 6 sec., the engraving's owner marks an attack target. For the next 3 sec., all of the archer's attacks against this target become critical. If the target dies while under the mark's effect, the archer instantly restores 10% / 11% / 12% / 13% / 15% / 17% / 20% health to self.
Also all unit's attacks against the marked targets ignore 50% / 51% / 52% / 53% / 55% / 60% armor for the duration of the battle.

Enhancement: 3
6000 Damage from the gems
Once every 6 sec., the engraving's owner marks an attack target. For the next 4 sec., all of the archer's attacks against this target become critical. If the target dies while under the mark's effect, the archer instantly restores 30% / 31% / 32% / 33% / 35% / 37% / 40% health to self and increases own damage by until 5% / 6% / 7% / 8% / 10% / 12% / 15% the end of battle. Stacks up to 10 times. Also all unit's attacks against the marked targets ignore 70% / 71% / 72% / 73% / 75% / 77% / 80% armor for the duration of the battle.
